    Class
    Description
    AbstractSpecializationHelper
    Common implementation for building and verifying specialization instances.
    AbstractTests
    Base abstract class for AST tests.
    AbstractTranslatorTests
    Common methods to check translation of expression formulas and axioms.
    Common
    Creates sets of all predicates or expressions to be used in unit tests.
    Common.TagSupply
     
    DatatypeParser
    Parser for IDatatype.
    DocTests
     
    ExtendedFormulas
    Common implementation of some formula extensions for use in tests.
    ExtendedFormulas.AssociativeExpressionExtension
     
    ExtendedFormulas.ExpressionExtension
    Implementation of a predicate extension which takes the form of a prefix symbol followed by two predicates and two expressions within parentheses.
    ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension
    Implementation of a predicate extension which takes the form of a prefix symbol followed by two predicates and two expressions within parentheses.
    ExtendedFormulas.PredicateExtension2
     
    ExtensionHelper
    A class to help building extended formulae.
    ExtensionHelper.AlphaPredicateExtension
    Implementation of a predicate operator α carrying two children: one predicate, and one expression of an arbitrary type.
    ExtensionHelper.GenericOperatorExtension
    Implementation of a generic operator with the same type profile as the generic identity operator.
    ExtensionHelper.Money
     
    FastFactory
    Provides simplistic methods for creating new formulae without too much typing.
    IdentsChecker
    Checks the identifier caches of formulas.
    ParenChecker
    Parentheses checker for checking the result of the various toString() methods of the AST library.
    SourceLocationChecker
    Simple implementation of the AST visitor to check that source locations are correctly nested into each other, reflecting the formula structure.
    SourceLocationOriginChecker
     
    SpecializationBuilder
    Utility class for building specialization objects from simple strings.
    SpecializationChecker
    Helper class for verifying the contents of a specialization instance.
    TestAST
    Test the abstract syntax tree.
    TestBA
     
    TestBoundIdentRenaming
    Unit test for the following methods: org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.toString() org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.toStringFullyParenthesized()
    TestCollectNamesAbove
     
    TestConflictResolver
    Some unit tests for formulas difficult to parse due to LL(1) conflicts.
    TestDeBruijn
    Test the equivalence of various ways of expressing the same quantified expression.
    TestEquals
    Unit test for formula equality and hash codes.
    TestErrors
    Unit test of error messages.
    TestExprTypeChecker
    Unit test of the mathematical formula Type-Checker for expressions with an expected type.
    TestFactoryCreation
    Unit tests about factory creation.
    TestFactoryTranslation
    Acceptance tests for factory translation.
    TestFIS
     
    TestFlattener
    Unit test for formula normalization.
    TestFormulaFactory
    Unit tests for factory methods which are not fully tested elsewhere.
    TestFormulaInspector
    Ensures that finding accumulators work as expected for addition of new findings.
    TestFormulaSpecialization
    Acceptance tests for specialization of formulas.
    TestFreeIdents
    Unit test for the following methods: org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.getFreeIdentifiers() org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.bindAllFreeIdents() org.eventb.core.ast.Formula.bindTheseIdents()
    TestFreshNameSolver
    Unit tests for class FreshNameSolver.
    TestGenParser
    This test class aims at supporting generic parser development.
    TestGivenTypes
    Tests for method Formula.getGivenTypes().
    TestIdentRenaming
    Unit tests for identifier renaming.
    TestIntStack
    Ensures that the IntStack class works properly.
    TestLegibility
    Unit test of the legibility checker.
    TestLexer
    This tests the lexical analyzer.
    TestLocation
    Tests about source locations stored by the parser in AST nodes.
    TestOrigin
     
    TestParser
     
    TestPosition
    Tests for interface IPosition and its standard implementation.
    TestPredicateVariables
    Ensures that the set of predicate variables occurring in a formula is computed correctly.
    TestSimpleVisitor
     
    TestSourceLocation

    TestTypeCheckError
    Unit test of errors produced by the mathematical formula Type-Checker.

    Unit tests for type synthesis happening at node construction.
    TestTypedGeneric

    TestTypedIdentDecl
     
    TestTypeEnvironment
     
    TestTypenvSpecialization
    Unit tests for specialization of type environments.
    TestTypes
    Unit tests for Event-B type construction, conversion back and forth to strings and expressions, and translation to another factory.
    TestTypeSpecialization
    Unit tests for specialization of types.
    TestUnparse
    This class tests the unparser, which is the toString method.
    TestVersionUpgrader
    Acceptance tests for upgrading from mathematical language V1 to V2.
    TestVisitor
     
    TestWD
    Unit and acceptance tests for the computation of WD lemmas.
